title: Bhroona
subTitle: Some of the villagers chance upon the temporary absence of a woman's husband and physically assault her, unbeknownst to the dire consequence that they would have to face.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Sidila Mari
subTitle: Ganganna and Ranga share a close, friendly bond with each other, but an accident between them causes Ranga to lose his life. Years later, Ranga's son seeks out Ganganna in order to exact revenge.

title: Aaradhane
subTitle: A religious leader performs sacred rituals and worships the idol of a Hindu deity while chanting holy hymns to seek divine blessings.

title: T W R Daivanveshane
subTitle: The host presents an extensive range of consumer products from various popular brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

title: Athi Aparoopa
subTitle: Upset due to his father's remarriage, Bharath leaves home. Eventually, he meets Aparna, a beautiful woman, and falls in love with her, unaware of her secret.

title: Sriramachandra
subTitle: Twins Srirama and Chandra are separated after their parents' divorce. When Srirama is killed by his greedy manager, he returns as a ghost and possesses his twin to exact revenge.

title: Eddelu Manjunatha
subTitle: Eddelu Manjunatha is a 2009 Kannada comedy drama film starring Jaggesh, Yagna Shetty and Tabla Nani. The story revolves around Manjunatha, a lazy man, who wants everything easy and doesn't wish to struggle to earn a living.

title: Natasaarvabhowma
subTitle: An investigative journalist, Gagan, moves to Bengaluru and ends up living in a supposedly haunted house. Soon, he realises a change in his behaviour after falling prey to supernatural activities.

title: The Villain
subTitle: Ramu sets out to find his estranged brother, Rama, to reunite him with their mother. However, Ramu soon discovers that Rama is a mafia don, which makes it difficult for Ramu to approach his brother.

title: Raju Kannada Medium
subTitle: Raju, a village boy, travels to Bengaluru in search of a better job. Along the way, he faces numerous challenges that teach him valuable life lessons.

title: Grahana
subTitle: A Brahmin village head's son, Puttaswamy, takes the initiative to bury the corpse of a Dalit man who has died during the Hebbaramma Festival. As a result of this, he is exiled to live with the Dalits.

title: Filler
subTitle: Catch nonstop promos, music, and fillers from your favorite movies and shows all in one place! Enjoy a seamless viewing experience packed with entertainment that'll keep you hooked.

title: Ijjodu
subTitle: Anand, a journalist, travels to a village to study more about architecture. He meets Channi, a devadasi, and learns details about the secrets of her dark past.

title: Teleshopping

title: Shivayogi Sri Puttayyajja
subTitle: Puttaraj, a visually impaired child, grows up poor and passionate about classical music. Soon, he becomes a renowned vocalist and multi-instrumentalist and wins many accolades making the nation proud.

title: Thavarina Siri
subTitle: Muttanna bravely navigates life's challenges to provide for his family while staying true to his humanitarian heart. Despite their struggles, he selflessly takes care of others.

title: Ghost
subTitle: A gangster and his team hijack a prison in the city on a quest for justice. They threaten to release all the criminals.

title: Vikrant Rona
subTitle: When Vikrant Rona sets off to investigate a gruesome murder, a series of tragic deaths leads him to discover a supernatural connection. With varying signals and clues, Vikrant must find the killer.

title: Yajamana
subTitle: Devi Shetty, a cruel gangster, is out to plunder a village's oil resources and ruin its inhabitants' livelihood. However, the son-in-law of the village head, Krishna, stands in his way.

title: Rambo 2
subTitle: Mayuri gets kidnapped when she is on a road trip with her friends, Krishna and DJ. However, the kidnapper releases her with a message for Krishna, whom he wants to kill.

title: Stunt Master
subTitle: Pooja, a college girl, does not believe in love. Her friends put forth a challenge that she should be friends with a man for thirty days without falling in love with him, but things go awry.

title: Aranmanai 3
subTitle: Jyothi, the daughter of a landlord, gets haunted by an unknown entity in her childhood. However, when the spirit begins to trouble another member of her family, she decides to uncover its identity.

title: Shravani Subramanya
subTitle: Subramanya, an aspiring singer, comes to Shravani's rescue when she discovers that her boyfriend Sudeep is a notorious criminal.

title: Rowdy Boys
subTitle: Kavya, a medical student, and Akshay, an engineering student, begin to fall for each other. However, an ugly gang war between their respective colleges impacts their love story.
